_comment: Victor -> Victini reveal — plays as sango/victor_transform fires (the swap happens the same tick). Victor body at 2522.6/131/2815.5 = the WEST ledge of Kesi's grain tower. Tower geometry (RCON block-probed 2026-07-16): inner cap cylinder x2524-2534 with a SOLID roof disc at y134, outer rim parapet at y132 (x2521 for z2813-2817, x2522 at z2812/2818) — the only open corridor with sight lines is the west walkway itself (x 2522.3-2523.5, y 132.8-135, z 2812-2819). The old east-side orbit (x 2524.5-2528) flew through the cap roof — that was the 'camera goes into a wall'. New path stays INSIDE the rim on the player's side: settle north on the ledge -> crane up and over Victini -> drop to a south close-up -> retreat up-and-back north along the ledge for the farewell (bookends the approach; keeping the farewell inside the rim is deliberate — a high outside angle puts the parapet across Victini's body). KEYFRAME-Y CONVENTION (see docs/ENGINE_FINDINGS.md): the spectated rig renders ~1.78 above keyframe y (armor-stand eye height), so keyframe y sits 1.78 below the intended camera eye; the RENDERED eye path here (y 132.9-134.8) is exactly the corridor that was verified open air against the live world (engine-exact tick sampler over RCON, zero solid hits, sight lines included), with yaw/pitch computed from those eye points.

cues.subtitle: §7It was waiting for someone worth speaking to
